Name: AWS RDS SQL Server - Backup to S3 Bucket
Description: Will create a database user using an existing server user if that database user does not exist without using SMO.

Parameters.Name: rdsSqlBackupSqlServer
Parameters.Label: SQL Server
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Server to perform the work on

Parameters.Name: rdsSqlBackupSqlLoginUserWhoHasCreateUserRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Login
Parameters.HelpText:
The login of the user who has permissions to create a database.

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: rdsSqlBackupSqlLoginPasswordWhoHasRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Password
Parameters.HelpText:
The password of the user who has permissions to create SQL Logins

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: rdsSqlBackupDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the database to create the user on

Parameters.Name: rdsSqlBackupS3Bucket
Parameters.Label: S3 Bucket Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the bucket (including any sub directories).

Parameters.Name: rdsSqlBackupFileName
Parameters.Label: Backup File Name and Extension
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the back up file (including the extension).
